'''Group One''' was a unit of the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]] that fought at the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]].

==Characteristics==
Group One contained at least two [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleships]].<ref name="Labyrinth of Evil" /> As such, it likely had at least 3,000 [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture'' droid starfighters]].<ref name="E1:ICS">''[[Star Wars: Episode I Incredible Cross-Sections]]''</ref>

==History==
Group One participated in the Battle of Coruscant during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. During the battle, at least two of its [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleships]] were destroyed.<ref name="Labyrinth of Evil" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1st}}
